column1:
Declare and initialize string variables in Java.  
Differentiate between string literals and other data types such as integers and characters.  
Perform input and output operations with strings, including handling strings with and without whitespace.  
Use Scanner methods next() and nextLine() appropriately to read strings from input.  
Analyze and resolve common issues when mixing different string input methods like next() and nextLine().
